name: 陶罐
wear: 自然粗糙纹理，轻微使用痕迹
shooting_angle: close-up from above and side, medium shot on table or hand-held
readable_text_policy: 不添加文字标签、logo、水印或说明字
scale_policy: realistic 1:1 scale with hand or table as anchor
reference_context_policy: hand palm or wooden table surface as scale reference, no clear stranger faces
reference_prompt: A realistic gray-brown rough clay jar, 15cm tall x 10cm diameter, open round mouth without lid, placed on a wooden table or held in hand for scale, textured pottery surface with subtle wear, static pose, neutral background。源记录硬约束：数量:1；位置:置于破布袋内，袋口微开可见；运动政策:随袋轻摇静止

source_contract.position: 置于破布袋内，袋口微开可见
